name: Blue Buffalo Life Protection Formula Adult Chicken & Brown Rice
shortDescription: Real chicken is the first ingredient in this premium dry dog food for adult dogs.
description: Blue Buffalo Life Protection Formula adult dog food features real chicken as the first ingredient, wholesome whole grains, garden veggies, and fruit. Enriched with LifeSource Bits — a precise blend of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals selected by holistic veterinarians.
features: No chicken by-product meals, corn, wheat, or soy
Contains LifeSource Bits for immune support
Omega 3 & 6 fatty acids for healthy coat

reviews.title: My dog loves it!
reviews.body: Switched from another brand and my Labrador's coat has never looked better. He also seems more energetic.

reviews.title: Good quality food
reviews.body: High quality ingredients, my picky eater actually finishes his bowl every time.

name: Taste of the Wild High Prairie Grain-Free Dry Dog Food
shortDescription: Grain-free formula with real roasted bison and venison for optimal nutrition.
description: Inspired by the diet of your dog's wild ancestors, Taste of the Wild High Prairie features real roasted bison and venison as primary proteins. This grain-free formula is packed with antioxidants from superfoods and supplemented with species-specific K9 Strain Proprietary Probiotics.
features: K9 Strain Probiotics for digestive health
No artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives

reviews.title: Best grain-free option
reviews.body: Our German Shepherd has been on this for 2 years. No digestive issues, great energy levels.

name: KONG Classic Dog Toy — Large
shortDescription: The #1 recommended dog toy by veterinarians and trainers worldwide.
description: The KONG Classic is made from natural rubber and is designed to satisfy dogs' instinctual needs. Stuff with KONG Easy Treat, peanut butter, or kibble to keep your dog busy for hours. Ideal for chewers, crate training, and separation anxiety.
features: Natural rubber — durable for moderate chewers

reviews.title: Absolute must-have
reviews.body: Stuff with frozen peanut butter — keeps my hyperactive Border Collie occupied for 30+ minutes.

name: Ruffwear Front Range Dog Harness
shortDescription: Everyday harness with padded chest and belly panel for all-day comfort.
description: The Ruffwear Front Range Harness is an everyday harness that combines comfort, security, and control. Features two leash attachment points, an ID pocket, and four points of adjustment for a custom fit.

name: Milk-Bone Original Dog Biscuits — Large
shortDescription: Classic dog biscuits with 12 vitamins and minerals baked right in.
description: Milk-Bone Original biscuits have been a dog favourite for over 100 years. Each biscuit is packed with 12 essential vitamins and minerals, designed to help maintain strong teeth and bones.

name: FurHaven Orthopedic Sofa Dog Bed — XL
shortDescription: Therapeutic egg-crate orthopedic foam sofa bed for large dogs.
description: The FurHaven Orthopedic Sofa Bed features a therapeutic egg-crate foam base that cushions pressure points and supports achy joints. The soft, plush sleeping surface is removable and machine washable.
features: Ideal for senior dogs & large breeds
